name: Hamburger & Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the entire package of mashed potatoes in a microwaveable casserole dish according to the microwave directions on the package.
3. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and add onions. Drain thoroughly.
4. When the potatoes are done, place the hamburger and onions over the potatoes and cover with cheese.
5. Cover and bake in the oven until the cheese is melted. Serve.
